title: ruteria africana
intro: Ruteria africana, also known as the African rue, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and seeds of Ruteria africana can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
